items.title: Competitive
items.subtitle: 5v5 Matchmaking
items.description: The gold standard of CS. Two teams of five, tactical strategy, and a 30-round limit.

items.title: Wingman
items.subtitle: 2v2 Partners
items.description: Fast-paced duo combat on single-site maps. Perfect for tactical pairs.

items.title: Deathmatch
items.subtitle: Free For All
items.description: Instant respawn. Practice your spray control and reflexes with any weapon.

items.title: Mirage
items.subtitle: Defusal Group
items.description: One of the most balanced maps in the game, set in a Middle Eastern city.

items.title: Dust II
items.subtitle: The Legend
items.description: The most iconic map in FPS history. Simple layout, high skill ceiling.

items.title: Nuke
items.subtitle: Nuclear Plant
items.description: A vertical map set in a power plant with two bombsites stacked on each other.

items.title: Butterfly Knife
items.subtitle: Fade Skin
items.description: Famous for its unique inspection animations and vibrant color gradient.

items.title: M4A1-S
items.subtitle: Printstream
items.description: The silenced rifle preferred for its accuracy and pearlescent finish.

items.title: AWP
items.subtitle: Dragon Lore
items.description: The most expensive and legendary sniper skin in the Counter-Strike universe.

items.title: AK-47
items.subtitle: Gold Arabesque
items.description: A luxury version of the world's most famous assault rifle.

items.title: Karambit
items.subtitle: Doppler
items.description: A curved blade mimicking a tiger's claw, perfect for close-quarters style.
